positive: A maximalist celestial tapestry featuring interconnected elements: geometric constellations made of glowing, ethereal lines, highly stylized crescent moons, floating planetary rings, and bioluminescent nebula clouds. The composition should be centralized and symmetrical, utilizing deep midnight blues, vibrant aquamarines, striking gold leaf accents, and stark white glowing highlights. The aesthetic is neo-art deco mixed with mystical scientific illustration, ensuring clean silhouettes and high contrast for print clarity. The overall feeling should be awe-inspiring and sophisticated, suitable for placement on clothing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, busy background, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, grain, messy lines
